creator: rob@sarcasticadmin.com
text:
I ran into this the other week on my ASRock N3150-ITX as well. It was hanging at the message: "can't find '/boot/entropy' early in the boot. Initially I thought I would update my ASRock BIOS to 2.00 but that did not resolve the issue.

I ended up having to set hw.vga.acpi_ignore_no_vga="1" in the loader to get it to boot.

I was using the following version of FreeBSD:

# uname -a
FreeBSD roomservice 12.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE r354233 GENERIC  amd64
